Serious target-size WCAG 2.2 axe 1 page, 22 instances

Ensure touch targets have sufficient size and space Learn more ↗

1 affected page — expand to see details

https://data.medicaid.gov/dataset/1c853fe0-28c0-43f9-a7ac-26d28c3633c2 (22 instances)

#data-table > div:nth-child(1) > .dc-c-datatable-wrapper.ds-u-border-x--1.ds-u-border-bottom--1 > .dc-c-datatable > thead > .dc-c-sticky-header > .ds-u-border-y--2[title="NDC1"][aria-sort="none"] > .dc-c-resize-handle.ds-u-focus-visible[aria-label="Resize NDC1 column"]
<button class="dc-c-resize-handle ds-u-focus-visible " aria-label="Resize NDC1 column"></button>

Fix: Fix any of the following: Target has insufficient size (10px by 58px, should be at least 24px by 24px) Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 22px instead of at least 24px.
